faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: To reset your password, click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the instructions sent to your email.

faqs.question: How can I update my profile information?
faqs.answer: Go to your account settings, click on 'Edit Profile', make your changes, and click 'Save' to update your information.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping takes 2-3 business days.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: You can cancel your order within 24 hours of placing it. After that, the order has already been processed for shipment.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for most items. Items must be unused and in original packaging.

faqs.question: How do I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: You can reach our customer support team via email at support@company.com, call 1-800-SUPPORT, or use the chat option on our website.

faqs.question: Is my personal information secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use SSL encryption and follow industry-standard security practices to protect your personal information.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty?
faqs.answer: We provide a 1-year warranty on all products covering manufacturing defects. Extended warranties are available for purchase.

faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can use this to track your package on our website or the carrier's website.
